# VyaptIX — AI Automation Tools for Business
> VyaptIX builds focused AI tools that remove real friction from business operations. Products go live in 3–7 days. No long implementations, no generic demos.

## Company
- Name: VyaptIX
- Website: https://vyaptix.com
- Founded: December 2025
- Founders: Ajeet Singh (CEO), Manish Singh (CTO)
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/vyaptix-ai
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/Vyaptix_ai

## Products

### AI Review Generator
- Platform: https://reviews.vyaptix.ai
- Page: https://vyaptix.com/solutions/ai-review-generation
- Status: Live
- What it does: Collects authentic Google reviews in under 20 seconds via QR code and AI-generated review text. Customers scan, rate, and the AI drafts a personalized review they post with one tap.
- Key stats: 20 seconds per review, 3× average review growth, Google-policy compliant
- Use cases: Restaurants, retail, clinics, legal firms, real estate agencies
- Pricing: Free tier available

### Setu — WhatsApp Marketing & Automation
- Platform: https://setu.vyaptix.ai
- Page: https://vyaptix.com/solutions/setu
- Status: Live
- What it does: WhatsApp broadcast campaigns, 24/7 AI chatbot, shared team inbox, contact CRM, lead pipeline (Kanban board), campaign analytics, role-based access. VyaptIX is a registered Meta Tech Provider.
- Key stats: 98% message open rate, 3× higher reply rate vs email, live in 2 minutes
- Pricing: From ₹999/month

### BankLens — AI Credit Decisioning
- Platform: https://banklens.vyaptix.ai
- Page: https://vyaptix.com/solutions/banklens
- Status: Live
- What it does: AI bank statement analysis and credit decisioning for NBFCs, DSAs, and fintech lenders. Ingests PDFs and images, computes 220+ financial signals, ML-powered credit scoring (0–100, A/B/C/D tiers), 14-signal fraud detection, audit-ready CAM reports.
- Compliance: DPDP 2023, RBI NBFC guidelines
- Supports: 40+ Indian banks
- Pricing: From ₹12/report

## Key Differentiators
- Products go live in 3–7 days (not months)
- No reseller agreements with any AI platform — recommendations are vendor-neutral
- Built for businesses of 5–500 people
- Results-focused: measures reviews, hours saved, leads converted — not features shipped
